function.name: power
function.description: Calculate base raised to the power of exponent.
function.long_description: Computes base^exponent, where base is raised to the power of exponent.
example_user_queries: Calculate 2 raised to the power of 10.
What is 5 to the power of 3?
Give me the result of 3 power 5.
Calculate power with base 12 and exponent 2.
What is 1.5 raised to the power 3?
Compute the value of 8 to the exponent 1.
Return the result for base 4 and exponent 6.
